title: What "waiting on God" actually looks like (it's not what you think)
caption:
"Wait on the Lord."

You've heard that. But have you read what the Hebrew actually means?

Qavah — to braid together, like rope under tension. Not sitting still. Not watching a clock. Binding yourself to the One who holds while the storm moves.

Biblical waiting is active. Abraham left. Joseph kept working in the prison. David kept playing the harp in the wilderness. Every one of them was waiting — and every one of them was moving.

The man who wants God more than the blessing never stops receiving.

#faith #scripture #christianmen #godlymen #manofgod #discipleship #isaiah40 #waitontheLord
theme: He chases God, not a wife.
